CREATE TABLE musicians (id Int32, name String);
CREATE TABLE albums (id Int32, musician_id Int32, title String);
INSERT INTO albums VALUES (1, 1, 'Overkill'), (2, 1, 'Ace of Spades'), (3, 2, 'Master of Puppets');
SELECT name, positionUTF8(name, 'r') AS pos FROM musicians;
SELECT name, positionUTF8(name, 'X') AS pos FROM musicians;
SELECT positionUTF8(name, 'ö') FROM musicians WHERE id = 1;
SELECT positionUTF8((SELECT name FROM musicians WHERE id = 1), 'r') AS pos;
SELECT a.title, positionUTF8(a.title, 'a') AS pos FROM albums a JOIN musicians m ON a.musician_id = m.id;
SELECT m.name, positionUTF8(a.title, 'o') AS pos FROM albums a JOIN musicians m ON a.musician_id = m.id WHERE a.title LIKE '%o%';
SELECT m.name, positionUTF8(m.name, m.name) AS pos FROM musicians;
SELECT positionUTF8('Motörhead', 'ö') + positionUTF8(name, 'o') AS total_pos FROM musicians;
SELECT IF(positionUTF8(name, 'r') > 0, 'Found', 'Not Found') AS search_result FROM musicians WHERE id = 2;
